name: HackerNews Daily Digest
description: A daily digest of HackerNews top stories. Pulls Hacker News' Firebase API, filters by minimum score and optional topics, prepends a markdown digest to digest.md, and keeps the dashboard's top stories list current. No API keys required.

schema.label: Highlight Topics (optional)
schema.description: Keywords or phrases to highlight in the digest (case-insensitive substring match against story titles). Leave empty to include every top story above the score threshold.

schema.label: Minimum Score
schema.description: Only include stories at or above this point score. HN's front page averages ~150; lower this to widen the net, raise it to focus on viral-only items.

schema.label: Maximum Items
schema.description: Cap on how many stories appear in each digest. Avoids blowing up the dashboard list when HN has a busy day.

modelRecommendation.rationale: Simple HTTP fetch + filter + markdown render. Haiku is plenty fast and the cheapest option for a daily run.
